Name: NirSoft Alternate Stream View
Description:
Scan your NTFS drive, and find all 
hidden alternate streams stored in the file system

Name: NirSoft App Crash View
Description: Display the details of all application crashes occurred in your system

Name: NirSoft App Read Write Counter
Description:
Counts and displays the current file read / write operations of every

Name: NirSoft GUI Prop View
Description: Displays extensive information about all windows currently opened on your system
